CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27293, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JAMES, AUSTIN     C/O LAWRENCEA MANN ATTORNEY AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JONATHAN HILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAMES, AUSTIN     C/O LAWRENCEA MANN ATTORNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, JONATHAN HILL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,022.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY WAS MISLEAD BY THE DEFENDANTS INSURANCE CARRIER TO THE DATE OF THE ACCIDENT. THE PROVISIONS SECTION 340 SUBDIVISION 3 THEREFORE DO NOT BAR PLAINTIFF'S ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JONATHAN HILL
